trans-unit.id: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.
trans-unit.resname: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.
trans-unit.source: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.
trans-unit.target: Do not attempt to open this HDI in Design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, this "How do I..." (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D (v16 and above).
trans-unit.target: Sorry, this "How do I..." (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D (v16 and above).

trans-unit.id: #5: Call the settings again and verify they are the same as set in step #1 and saved in step #2.
trans-unit.resname: #5: Call the settings again and verify they are the same as set in step #1 and saved in step #2.
trans-unit.source: #5: Call the settings again and verify they are the same as set in step #1 and saved in step #2.
trans-unit.target: #5: Call the settings again and verify they are the same as set in step #1 and saved in step #2.

trans-unit.id: #4: Reload the saved settings from the BLOB saved in step #2.
trans-unit.resname: #4: Reload the saved settings from the BLOB saved in step #2.
trans-unit.source: #4: Reload the saved settings from the BLOB saved in step #2.
trans-unit.target: #4: Reload the saved settings from the BLOB saved in step #2.

trans-unit.source: #3: Modify the print settings again (e.g. : back to Portrait, scale 100% and "Legal US"format...)
trans-unit.target: #3: Modify the print settings again (e.g. : back to Portrait, scale 100% and "Legal US"format...)

trans-unit.id: #2: Save those settings. All the options you have modified shall be memorized and saved in a BLOB.
trans-unit.resname: #2: Save those settings. All the options you have modified shall be memorized and saved in a BLOB.
trans-unit.source: #2: Save those settings. All the options you have modified shall be memorized and saved in a BLOB.
trans-unit.target: #2: Save those settings. All the options you have modified shall be memorized and saved in a BLOB.

trans-unit.source: #1: First call the print settings and modify some of them. (e.g. : Landscape, scale 80%, "A5" paper format...)
trans-unit.target: #1: First call the print settings and modify some of them. (e.g. : Landscape, scale 80%, "A5" paper format...)

trans-unit.source: Two new commands from the 4D Pack Plugin have been improved and integrated into 4D : "Print settings to BLOB" and "BLOB to print settings". These commands allow you to memorize and reload a user's print settings, even those that cannot be set using 4D "Get print option" and "SET PRINT OPTION" commands.
trans-unit.target: Two new commands from the 4D Pack Plugin have been improved and integrated into 4D : "Print settings to BLOB" and "BLOB to print settings". These commands allow you to memorize and reload a user's print settings, even those that cannot be set using 4D "Get print option" and "SET PRINT OPTION" commands.
